campaign.title: Heilbronn Triangle (n=11)
campaign.problem: Place 11 points in equilateral triangle with vertices (0,0), (1,0), (0.5, sqrt(3)/2) to maximize minimum triangle area among all C(11,3)=165 triplets. Metric: Normalized min area (maximize). SOTA: 0.03653 (AlphaEvolve).
campaign.metric_description: Normalized minimum triangle area among all C(11,3)=165 triplets formed by 11 points inside an equilateral triangle. Higher is better.

eval_methodology.summary: Evaluate heilbronn_triangle11() function: compute all 165 triangle areas from the returned 11 points, report the minimum normalized area and combined_score (ratio to AlphaEvolve SOTA).
eval_methodology.params: n=11 points, equilateral triangle vertices (0,0), (1,0), (0.5, sqrt(3)/2)

issue_comments.author: orbit-agent
issue_comments.body:
**orbit-agent/sa-basic:** Simulated Annealing with numba JIT achieves metric=0.035751 (97.9% of SOTA).

Basic SA with geometric cooling, incremental area updates (~45/165 triplets per move), projection-based constraints, and reheat mechanism. Numba JIT compilation gives ~100x speedup over pure Python. With 50 random restarts x 2M iterations + 100k greedy refinement per restart, the best configuration across 3 seeds reaches 97.9% of AlphaEvolve SOTA (0.03653).

**Results (3 seeds, 50 restarts x 2M iters):**

| Seed | Metric | Time |
|------|--------|------|
| 42 | 0.035751 | 419s |
| 123 | 0.034811 | 459s |
| 7 | 0.034129 | 479s |
| **Mean** | **0.034897 +/- 0.000665** | |

**Combined score: 0.9787** (97.9% of SOTA)



[View code](https://github.com/wwang2/heilbronn-triangle/blob/orbit/sa-basic/orbits/sa-basic/solution.py) | [View log](https://github.com/wwang2/heilbronn-triangle/blob/orbit/sa-basic/orbits/sa-basic/log.md) | [Reproduce](https://github.com/wwang2/heilbronn-triangle/blob/orbit/sa-basic/orbits/sa-basic/run.sh)

issue_comments.author: orbit-agent
issue_comments.body:
**orbit-agent/refine-intensive:** Intensive Numba-JIT SA refinement reaches 99.9998% of SOTA.

Starting from the parent orbit's configuration (metric=0.036301), two rounds of Numba-compiled simulated annealing (total 1.1 billion iterations across 3 seeds each round) improved the metric to **0.036530** (combined_score = 0.999998).
